selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 水, 雨水, 海水, 水位, 水面, 流水；vt. 给...浇水, 供以水, 注入水, 使湿
words.definition: n. binary compound that occurs at room temperature as a clear colorless odorless tasteless liquid; freezes into ice below 0 degrees centigrade and boils above 1

words.translation: n. 船；vi. 乘船
words.definition: n. a small vessel for travel on water

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 池塘；v. 筑成池塘
words.definition: n. a small lake

words.translation: n. 边缘, 尖锐, 刀刃, 优势；vt. 使锐利, 挤进, 镶边
words.definition: n. the boundary of a surface

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: n. 先生, 阁下
words.definition: n. term of address for a man

words.translation: n. 捕捉, 陷阱, 捕捉之物, 抓, 拉手；vt. 捕捉, 赶上, 感染, 听清楚
words.definition: n. a drawback or difficulty that is not readily evident

words.translation: n. 晚餐, 正餐, 宴会
words.definition: n. the main meal of the day served in the evening or at midday

words.translation: n. 鱼, 鱼肉, 鱼类, 接合板；vt. 钓, 钓鱼, 查出, 用接合板连接
words.definition: n. any of various mostly cold-blooded aquatic vertebrates usually having scales and breathing through gills

words.translation: adv. 作为替代, 反而
words.definition: r in place of, or as an alternative to

words.translation: n. 午餐
words.definition: n. a midday meal

words.translation: n. 雨, 下雨, 雨天；vi. 下雨
words.definition: n. water falling in drops from vapor condensed in the atmosphere

words.translation: prep. 越过, 穿过, 与...相交叉, 在...的对面；adv. 交叉, 到另一边, 在对面, 成十字
words.definition: r. to the opposite side

words.translation: adv. 几乎, 差不多
words.definition: r (of actions or states) slightly short of or not quite accomplished; all but

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: s. not present; having left

words.translation: n. 黑色, 黑颜料；a. 黑色的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of least lightness (bearing the least resemblance to white)

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: v. 考虑, 思考, 认为
words.definition: v. take into consideration for exemplifying purposes

words.translation: a. 别的, 其他的；adv. 另外, 否则, 不然
words.definition: a. & pron. Other; one or something beside; as, Who else is

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的
words.definition: n. green color or pigment; resembling the color of growing grass

words.translation: n. 一半, 半场, 不完全；a. 一半的, 不完全的, 部分的, 半场的
words.definition: n. one of two divisions into which some games or performances are divided: the two divisions are separated by an interval

words.translation: n. 小时, 钟头, 时间, ...点钟, 课时
words.definition: n. a period of time equal to 1/24th of a day

words.translation: n. 列, 线, 绳, 电线, 线路, 路线, 航线, 作业线, 界线, 战线, 外形, 排, 家系；vt. 排成一行, 顺...排列, 划线于, 加衬里, 使有线条, 使起皱纹
words.definition: n. a formation of people or things one beside another

words.translation: n. 中央, 中间, 腰部；a. 中央的, 中庸的, 中间的
words.definition: n. an intermediate part or section

words.translation: n. 给予(物), 出价, 提议, 意图, 报价；vt. 提供, 出价, 奉献, 试图, 使出现, 演出
words.definition: n. the verbal act of offering

words.translation: n. 公开, 户外, 空旷；a. 开着的, 开放的, 开阔的, 营业着的, 公开的, 悬而未决的
words.definition: n. a clear or unobstructed space or expanse of land or water

words.translation: n. 植物, 作物, 工厂, 树枝, 生长, 设施, 成套设备；vt. 种植, 栽培, 播种, 培养, 安置, 殖民于, 使位于
words.definition: n. buildings for carrying on industrial labor

words.translation: n. 伸出, 延伸, 区域, 范围, 流域, 岬；vt. 到达, 达到, 伸出, 延伸, 影响
words.definition: n. the act of physically reaching or thrusting out

words.translation: a. 红的, 红色的, 红肿的, 流血的；n. 红色, 红颜料, 赤字
words.definition: n. red color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of blood

words.translation: n. 旁边, 侧, 方面, 胁, 侧边, 血统；a. 旁的, 侧的, 次要的
words.definition: n. a place within a region identified relative to a center or reference location

words.translation: a. 确信, 必然的, 必定的；adv. 当然, 确实地, 无疑地
words.definition: s. physically secure or dependable

words.translation: n. 惊奇, 奇袭, 诧异；vt. 使惊奇, 撞见, 奇袭
words.definition: n. the astonishment you feel when something totally unexpected happens to you

words.translation: adv. 两次, 两倍
words.definition: r. two times

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前；conj. 直到...时, 在...以前
words.definition: prep. To; unto; towards; -- used of material objects.

words.translation: n. 等待, 等候；vt. 等候, 期待, 延缓, 伺候, 推迟
words.definition: n. the act of waiting (remaining inactive in one place while expecting something)

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
words.definition: n. a member of the Caucasoid race

words.translation: n. 钓鱼, 鱼业；a. 钓鱼的
words.definition: n. the act of someone who fishes as a diversion

words.translation: n. 漂流物, 浮舟, 漂浮, 浮萍, 彩车；vi. 浮动, 飘动, 散播, 摇摆, 动摇, 浮动
words.definition: n. the time interval between the deposit of a check in a bank and its payment

words.translation: n. 盘子, 碟, 菜肴
words.definition: n. a piece of dishware normally used as a container for holding or serving food

words.translation: n. 一种描述, 版本, 译文
words.definition: n. an interpretation of a matter from a particular viewpoint

words.translation: n. 袋子, 袋状物；vt. 使膨大, 装袋, 猎获
words.definition: n. a flexible container with a single opening

words.translation: a. 美丽的
words.definition: a. delighting the senses or exciting intellectual or emotional admiration

words.translation: n. 鸟, 羽毛球；vi. 打鸟
words.definition: n. warm-blooded egg-laying vertebrates characterized by feathers and forelimbs modified as wings

words.translation: n. 瓶子, 酒瓶；vt. 装瓶, 抑制, 围困
words.definition: n. a glass or plastic vessel used for storing drinks or other liquids; typically cylindrical without handles and with a narrow neck that can be plugged or cappe

words.translation: n. 底部；a. 底部的
words.definition: n. the lower side of anything

words.translation: n. 感冒, 寒冷；a. 寒冷的, 冷淡的, 冷静的
words.definition: n. a mild viral infection involving the nose and respiratory passages (but not the lungs)

words.translation: n. 堂兄弟姊妹, 表兄弟姊妹
words.definition: n. the child of your aunt or uncle

words.translation: v. 吃, 腐蚀
words.definition: v. take in solid food

words.translation: n. 脂肪, 脂油, 肥肉；a. 肥的, 胖的, 油腻的
words.definition: n. a soft greasy substance occurring in organic tissue and consisting of a mixture of lipids (mostly triglycerides)

words.translation: n. 黄金, 钱财, 金块, 金色, 宝贵；a. 金的, 似金的, 金色的, 金制的

words.translation: n. 头发, 毛发, 些微

words.translation: n. 马, 骑兵, 脚架；vi. 骑马, 取笑

words.translation: vt. 邀请, 请求, 引起, 招致；n. 邀请

words.definition: n. a polite name for any woman

words.translation: adv. 几乎, 密切地
words.definition: r (of actions or states) slightly short of or not quite accomplished; all but

words.translation: n. 小人物, 无名小卒；pron. 无人, 没有人
words.definition: n a person of no influence

words.translation: n. 笔记, 记录, 注解, 票据, 符号, 显要, 注重, 便笺, 照会；vt. 记录, 注解, 注意

words.translation: n. 一双, 一对, 一副；v. (使)成对

words.translation: adv. 请；vt. 使高兴, 合...的心意, 取悦

words.translation: n. 味道, 品味, 味觉, 感受, 体验, 爱好, 审美, 少量；vt. 尝, 察觉...的味道, 体会

words.translation: n. 信任, 信赖, 相信, 受托, 职责, 信心, 托拉斯；a. 信托的, 托拉斯的

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着

words.translation: a. 较好的；adv. 比较好
words.definition: n. something superior in quality or condition or effect

words.translation: n. 咬, 一口；v. 咬, 刺痛, 穿透

words.translation: n. 较少, 较小；a. 少的, 小的

words.translation: n. 事件, 物质, 原因, 素材, 实体, 重要；vi. 有关系

words.translation: n. 色拉

words.translation: a. 巨大的, 庞大的
words.definition: s. extraordinarily large in size or extent or amount or power or degree; that a whole civilization should be dependent on technology"- Walter Lippman

words.translation: n. 波兰人, 极点, 磁极, 电极, 杆, 竿, 相反的极端；vt. 用竿支撑
